newString:
model FixedAsset {
  id                        String             @id @default(uuid())
  companyId                 String
  categoryId                String?
  name                      String
  description               String?
  acquisitionDate           DateTime
  cost                      Decimal            @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  salvageValue              Decimal?           @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  usefulLifeMonths          Int?
  depreciationMethod        DepreciationMethod @default(STRAIGHT_LINE)
  status                    AssetStatus        @default(ACTIVE)
  assetAccountId            String?            @db.Text
  accumulatedDepreciationId String?            @db.Text
  depreciationExpenseAccountId String?         @db.Text
  createdAt                 DateTime           @default(now())

  company       Company                  @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  category      FixedAssetCategory?      @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  assetAccount  Account?                 @relation("FixedAsset_assetAccount", fields: [assetAccountId], references: [id])
  accumAccount  Account?                 @relation("FixedAsset_accumAccount", fields: [accumulatedDepreciationId], references: [id])
  depreciationExpenseAccount Account?   @relation("FixedAsset_depreciationExpense", fields: [depreciationExpenseAccountId], references: [id])
  depreciations FixedAssetDepreciation[]
  disposals     AssetDisposal[]
  impairments   AssetImpairment[]
  revaluations  AssetRevaluation[]
  maintenances  AssetMaintenance[]
  insurances    AssetInsurance[]

  @@index([companyId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  fixedAssetSchedules FixedAssetSchedule[]
  depreciationAccounts DepreciationAccount[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to FixedAsset

newString:
model Account {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId String
  code      String
  name      String
  typeId    Int
  parentId  String?
  currency  String   @default("USD")
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
  isSystem  Boolean  @default(false)
  cashFlowType String? // OPERATING, INVESTING, FINANCING
  cashFlowCategoryId String?
  normalSide NormalSide? // optional override of the AccountType normalSide
  balance   Decimal  @default(0) @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  company                  Company              @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  type                     AccountType          @relation(fields: [typeId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  cashFlowCategory          CashFlowCategory?   @relation(fields: [cashFlowCategoryId], references: [id])
  children                 Account[]            @relation("acct_children")
  parent                   Account?             @relation("acct_children", fields: [parentId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  journalLines             JournalEntryLine[]
  AccountSubType           AccountSubType?      @relation(fields: [accountSubTypeId], references: [id])
  accountSubTypeId         Int?
  OpeningBalance           OpeningBalance[]
  TaxCodeAccount           TaxCodeAccount[]
  BillLine                 BillLine[]
  VendorCreditLine         VendorCreditLine[]
  BudgetLine               BudgetLine[]
  CustomerCreditLine       CustomerCreditLine[]
  fixedAssetAsAssetAccount FixedAsset[]         @relation("FixedAsset_assetAccount")
  fixedAssetAsAccumAccount FixedAsset[]         @relation("FixedAsset_accumAccount")

  @@unique([companyId, code])
  @@index([companyId, name])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  depreciationAccounts DepreciationAccount[] @relation("DepreciationAccount_expense")
  depreciationAccounts1 DepreciationAccount[] @relation("DepreciationAccount_accum")
  accountBalanceAudits AccountBalanceAudit[]
  currencyRevaluationEntries CurrencyRevaluationEntry[]
  yearEndCloses YearEndClose[] @relation("YearEndClose_RE")
  yearEndCloses1 YearEndClose[] @relation("YearEndClose_IS")
  equityAccounts EquityAccount[]
  payrollTaxLiabilities PayrollTaxLiability[]
  accrualSchedules AccrualSchedule[] @relation("AccrualSchedule_Account")
  accrualSchedules1 AccrualSchedule[] @relation("AccrualSchedule_OffsetAccount")
  accountSegments AccountSegment[]
  items Item[] @relation("Item_cogsAccount")
  items1 Item[] @relation("Item_inventoryReserve")
  payrollAccruals PayrollAccrual[]
  productionRuns ProductionRun[]
  deferredTaxs DeferredTax[]
  withholdingTaxDeductions WithholdingTaxDeduction[] @relation("WithholdingTax_Account")
  finalTaxDeductions FinalTaxDeduction[] @relation("FinalTax_Account")
  percentageTaxs PercentageTax[] @relation("PercentageTax_Account")
  philippinePayrollDeductions PhilippinePayrollDeduction[] @relation("PhilPayrollDeduction_Account")
  defaultAccountMappings DefaultAccountMapping[]
  expenseClaimLines ExpenseClaimLine[]
  cashOverShortEntries CashOverShortEntry[]
  cashOverShortRules CashOverShortRule[]
  pettyCashFunds PettyCashFund[]
  pettyCashVouchers PettyCashVoucher[]
  writeOffs WriteOff[]
  subsidiaryLedgers SubsidiaryLedger[]
  budgetActualComparisons BudgetActualComparison[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Account

newString:
model FixedAssetSchedule {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId   String
  assetId     String
  method      String   // STRAIGHT_LINE, DB, MACRS, etc.
  startDate   DateTime
  endDate     DateTime
  totalAmount Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  company      Company                @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  asset        FixedAsset             @relation(fields: [assetId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  depreciations FixedAssetDepreciation[]

  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([assetId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  fixedAssetSchedules FixedAssetSchedule[]
  depreciationAccounts DepreciationAccount[]
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  depreciationJournals DepreciationJournal[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to FixedAssetSchedule

model Practice {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId     String

  name            String
  servicesOffered String?

  isActive        Boolean  @default(true)

  // Onboarding status is per-practice
  onboardingCompleted Boolean @default(false)
  onboardingMode      String  @default("full") @map("onboarding_mode")

  trialStartsAt   DateTime?
  trialEndsAt     DateTime?

  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  workspace       Workspace     @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  subscription    Subscription? @relation("PracticeSubscription")
  onboardingSteps OnboardingStep[]
  practiceUsers   PracticeUser[]
  auditLogs       AuditLog[]
  tasks           Task[]         @relation("PracticeTasks")

  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([isActive])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  workflows Workflow[]
  recurringSchedules RecurringSchedule[]
  subscriptionReminders SubscriptionReminder[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Practice

  workspaceId         String                @map("tenantId")

model BillPayment {
  id                    String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId             String?
  workspaceId           String   @map("tenantId")
  billId                String
  amount                Decimal  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  paymentDate           DateTime @default(now())
  method                String
  referenceNumber       String?
  bankAccountId         String?
  vendorPaymentMethodId String?
  currency              String?
  exchangeRate          Decimal? @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseAmount            Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  deletedAt             DateTime?

  workspace              Workspace                @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  bill                   Bill                     @relation(fields: [billId], references: [id])
  bankAccount            BankAccount?             @relation(fields: [bankAccountId], references: [id])
  vendorPaymentMethod    VendorPaymentMethod?     @relation(fields: [vendorPaymentMethodId], references: [id])
  company                Company?                 @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  BillPaymentApplication BillPaymentApplication[]
  refunds                VendorRefund[]
  journalEntryId         String?
  journalEntry           JournalEntry?            @relation("JournalEntry_BillPayments", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])

  createdById      String?
  updatedById      String?
  createdBy        User?                    @relation("BillPayment_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy        User?                    @relation("BillPayment_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, billId])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([companyId, billId])
  @@index([journalEntryId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, paymentDate, deletedAt])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  contractorPayments ContractorPayment[]
  checks Check[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to BillPayment

newString:
model Employee {
  id              String    @id @default(uuid())
  companyId       String
  contactId       String? // optional link to Contact
  employeeNumber  String?
  firstName       String
  lastName        String
  taxId           String?
  ssnHash         String?   @db.Text
  hireDate        DateTime?
  terminationDate DateTime?
  payRate         Decimal?  @db.Decimal(12, 2) // default hourly/salary rate
  payType         String? // SALARY | HOURLY
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  company               Company               @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  // back-references for payroll relations
  payrollRunEmployees   PayrollRunEmployee[]
  paychecks             Paycheck[]
  // Time tracking back-relations
  timesheets            Timesheet[]
  timeEntries           TimeEntry[]
  taxInfo               EmployeeTaxInfo?
  i9Form                FormI9?
  // Philippine-specific deductions
  payrollDeductions     PhilippinePayrollDeduction[]
  employeeLoans         EmployeeLoan[]
  loanPayments          EmployeeLoanPayment[]
  timeOffBalances       TimeOffBalance[]
  timeOffRequests       TimeOffRequest[]
  thirteenthMonthPays   ThirteenthMonthPay[]
  governmentContributionPayments GovernmentContributionPayment[]

  @@index([companyId])
  @@unique([companyId, employeeNumber])
  @@unique([companyId, taxId])
  @@unique([companyId, ssnHash])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  payrollAccruals PayrollAccrual[]
  expenseClaims ExpenseClaim[]
  pettyCashFunds PettyCashFund[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Employee

model Item {
  id                      String                     @id @default(uuid())
  companyId               String
  sku                     String?
  name                    String
  type                    String
  salesPrice              Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(20, 4) // Base sales price
  purchaseCost            Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(20, 4) // Base purchase cost
  standardCost            Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(20, 4) // Standard cost for variance analysis
  discountAllowed         Boolean                    @default(true)
  maxDiscountPercent      Decimal?                   @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  
  trackingType            String?                    @default("NONE") // NONE, SERIAL, LOT
  createdAt               DateTime                   @default(now())
  inventoryAssetAccountId String?
  cogsAccountId           String?
  inventoryReserveAccountId String?
  costMethod              String?                    @default("FIFO")
  InvoiceLine             InvoiceLine[]
  BillLine                BillLine[]
  PurchaseOrderLine       PurchaseOrderLine[]
  stockLevels             StockLevel[]
  inventoryLines          InventoryTransactionLine[]
  costLayers              InventoryCostLayer[]
  priceListItems          PriceListItem[]
  // Assembly relations
  assemblyBuilds          AssemblyBuild[]      @relation("ItemBuilt")
  assemblyComponents      AssemblyComponent[]  @relation("ItemComponent")
  cogsAccount             Account?                   @relation("Item_cogsAccount", fields: [cogsAccountId], references: [id])
  inventoryReserveAccount Account?                   @relation("Item_inventoryReserve", fields: [inventoryReserveAccountId], references: [id])
  company                 Company                    @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  @@index([companyId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  inventoryReserves InventoryReserve[]
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
  productionRuns ProductionRun[]
  quoteLines QuoteLine[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Item

newString:
model InvoiceLine {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  companyId       String
  invoiceId       String
  workspaceId     String @map("tenantId")
  itemId          String?
  description     String
  quantity        Decimal  @db.Decimal(12, 4)
  unitPrice       Decimal  @map("rate") @db.Decimal(16, 6)
  totalPrice      Decimal  @map("amount") @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  discountPercent Decimal? @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  discountAmount  Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)

  invoice    Invoice   @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  item       Item?     @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  workspace  Workspace @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  company    Company   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  classId    String?
  class      Class?    @relation(fields: [classId], references: [id])
  locationId String?
  location   Location? @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  projectId  String?
  project    Project?  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  LineTax    LineTax[]
  revenueSchedules RevenueSchedule[]

  @@index([workspaceId])
  @@index([workspaceId, itemId])
  @@index([workspaceId, invoiceId])
  @@index([companyId, invoiceId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to InvoiceLine

newString:
model InventoryTransactionLine {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId     String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId       String?
  transactionId   String
  itemId          String
  stockLocationId String?
  qty             Decimal  @db.Decimal(28, 6)
  unitCost        Decimal? @db.Decimal(28, 6)
  lineType        String?
  serialNumber    String?
  lotNumber       String?
  expirationDate  DateTime?

  workspace     Workspace               @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  transaction   InventoryTransaction @relation(fields: [transactionId], references: [id])
  item          Item                 @relation(fields: [itemId], references: [id])
  stockLocation StockLocation?       @relation(fields: [stockLocationId], references: [id])
  costLayers    InventoryCostLayer[] @relation("tx_line_costlayers")
  company       Company?             @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  classId       String?
  class         Class?               @relation(fields: [classId], references: [id])
  locationId    String?
  location      Location?            @relation(fields: [locationId], references: [id])
  projectId     String?
  project       Project?             @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, itemId])
  @@index([workspaceId, transactionId])
  @@index([companyId, itemId])
  @@index([itemId, stockLocationId])
  @@index([transactionId, itemId])
  @@index([serialNumber])
  @@index([lotNumber])
  @@index([expirationDate])
  @@unique([itemId, serialNumber], name: "item_serial_unique")
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  cOGSRecognitions COGSRecognition[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to InventoryTransactionLine

newString:
model InventoryTransaction {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId       String   @map("tenantId")
  companyId         String?
  transactionNumber String?
  type              String // RECEIPT, SHIPMENT, TRANSFER, ADJUSTMENT
  reference         String?
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  deletedAt         DateTime?

  purchaseOrderId String?
  purchaseOrder   PurchaseOrder? @relation(fields: [purchaseOrderId], references: [id])

  workspace       Workspace                  @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  lines          InventoryTransactionLine[]
  postingStatus  PostingStatus              @default(DRAFT)
  company        Company?                   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  journalEntryId String?
  journalEntry   JournalEntry?              @relation("JournalEntry_InventoryTransactions", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  invoiceId      String?
  invoice        Invoice?                   @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id])

  @@index([workspaceId, transactionNumber])
  @@index([workspaceId, createdAt])
  @@index([journalEntryId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  inventoryAdjustmentRequests InventoryAdjustmentRequest[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to InventoryTransaction

newString:
model Invoice {
  id             String    @id @default(uuid())
  workspaceId    String    @map("tenantId")
  companyId      String
  invoiceNumber  String?
  customerId     String
  status         InvoiceStatus    @default(DRAFT)
  paymentStatus  PaymentStatus @default(DRAFT)
  totalAmount    Decimal   @map("total") @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  balance        Decimal   @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  currency       String?
  exchangeRate   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseTotal      Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  transactionType TransactionType?
  discountAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  shippingAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  otherCharges   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  withholdingTaxAmount Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  finalTaxAmount       Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  date           DateTime  @default(now()) @map("issuedAt")
  dueDate        DateTime?
  paymentTermId  String?
  paymentTerm    PaymentTerm? @relation(fields: [paymentTermId], references: [id])
  deletedAt      DateTime?

  createdById   String?
  updatedById   String?
  createdBy     User? @relation("Invoice_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy     User? @relation("Invoice_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])
  
  // Customization
  templateId    String?
  template      DocumentTemplate? @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id])

  workspace                  Workspace                   @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  customer                   Customer                    @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [contactId])
  lines                      InvoiceLine[]
  journalEntryId             String?
  journalEntry               JournalEntry?               @relation("JournalEntry_Invoices", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  postingStatus              PostingStatus               @default(DRAFT)
  company                    Company                     @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  InvoicePaymentApplication  InvoicePaymentApplication[]
  customerCreditApplications CustomerCreditApplication[] @relation("Invoice_CreditApplications")
  inventoryTransactions      InventoryTransaction[]
  quotes                     Quote[]                     @relation("QuoteToInvoice")
  writeOffs                  WriteOff[]

  @@unique([companyId, invoiceNumber])
  @@index([workspaceId, status, dueDate])
  @@index([workspaceId, date])
  @@index([workspaceId, customerId, status])
  @@index([companyId, customerId, status])
  @@index([companyId, date])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([companyId, postingStatus, date])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueDate, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, dueDate, balance, status])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueDate, balance])
  @@index([companyId, paymentStatus, dueDate])
  @@index([companyId, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, dueDate, balance, status, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, customerId, dueDate, balance])
  @@index([companyId, templateId])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  creditNotes CreditNote[]
  dunningNotices DunningNotice[]
  paymentReminders PaymentReminder[]
  disputes Dispute[]
  chargebacks Chargeback[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Invoice

model Bill {
  id             String    @id @default(uuid())
  companyId      String
  workspaceId    String   @map("tenantId")
  vendorId       String
  billNumber     String?
  status         BillStatus    @default(DRAFT)
  paymentStatus  PaymentStatus @default(DRAFT)
  total          Decimal   @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  balance        Decimal   @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  currency       String?
  exchangeRate   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(28, 12)
  baseTotal      Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  transactionType TransactionType?
  discountAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  shippingAmount Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  otherCharges   Decimal?  @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  withholdingTaxAmount Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  creditableWithholding Decimal? @db.Decimal(20, 4)
  issuedAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  dueAt          DateTime?
  paymentTermId  String?
  paymentTerm    PaymentTerm? @relation(fields: [paymentTermId], references: [id])
  description    String?
  deletedAt      DateTime?

  workspace              Workspace                @relation(fields: [workspaceId], references: [id])
  vendor                 Vendor                   @relation(fields: [vendorId], references: [contactId])
  lines                  BillLine[]
  payments               BillPayment[]
  journalEntryId         String?
  journalEntry           JournalEntry?            @relation("JournalEntry_Bills", fields: [journalEntryId], references: [id])
  postingStatus          PostingStatus            @default(DRAFT)
  company                Company                  @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)
  BillPaymentApplication BillPaymentApplication[]
  writeOffs              WriteOff[]

  createdById      String?
  updatedById      String?
  createdBy        User?                    @relation("Bill_createdBy", fields: [createdById], references: [id])
  updatedBy        User?                    @relation("Bill_updatedBy", fields: [updatedById], references: [id])

  @@unique([companyId, vendorId, billNumber])
  @@index([createdById])
  @@index([updatedById])
  @@index([workspaceId, status])
  @@index([workspaceId, vendorId])
  @@index([workspaceId, vendorId, status])
  @@index([companyId, vendorId, status])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([workspaceId, issuedAt])
  @@index([deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueAt, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, postingStatus, issuedAt])
  @@index([companyId, status, dueAt, balance])
  @@index([companyId, paymentStatus, dueAt])
  @@index([companyId, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, dueAt, balance, status, deletedAt])
  @@index([companyId, vendorId, dueAt, balance])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  debitNotes DebitNote[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Bill

newString:
model Country {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  code                CountryCode @unique
  name                String
  defaultCurrency     String   @default("USD")
  defaultTaxYear      Int?
  taxSystem           Json?    // Stored configuration for tax rules
  defaultWithholdingRates Json?
  defaultVatRate      Decimal? @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  defaultCorporateTaxRate Decimal? @db.Decimal(10, 6)
  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())

  // Localization & display preferences
  locale              String?  // e.g., "en-PH" (IETF language tag)
  preferredLanguage   String?  // e.g., "en", "fil"
  timeZone            String?  // e.g., "Asia/Manila"
  dateFormat          String?  // e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD"

  companies               Company[]
  jurisdictions          TaxJurisdiction[]
  taxRates                TaxRate[]
  birFormTemplates        BirFormTemplate[]
  chartOfAccountsTemplates ChartOfAccountsTemplate[]
  localTaxTypes           LocalTaxTypeConfig[]
  taxModules              CountryTaxModule[]
  taxTreatiesFrom         TaxTreaty[] @relation("TreatyFrom")
  taxTreatiesTo           TaxTreaty[] @relation("TreatyTo")
  nexusRecords            Nexus[]

  @@index([code])
  @@index([locale])
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  taxAuthorities TaxAuthority[]
  taxPeriodLocks TaxPeriodLock[]
  taxCalendars TaxCalendar[]
  complianceDeadlines ComplianceDeadline[]
  taxAttributeCarryforwards TaxAttributeCarryforward[]
  taxIncentives TaxIncentive[]
  taxRules TaxRule[]
  vatRegistrations VatRegistration[]
  // Auto-added opposite relations (generated)
  documentRetentions DocumentRetention[]
}
explanation: Add missing opposite relations to Country
